emails.subject: Huber Contracts
emails.body: Huber Contracts Gerald/Mark I dropped off the Huber contracts as follows: Trailblazer Assignment and Assumption Agreement dropped off one original for execution. The VP was not there to sign. We should receive the executed original back from Huber this week. Thereafter, all three originals go to Trailblazer for signature. Capacity Assignment and Prearranged Release Agreement gave original to Brian Stone. Amended and Restated Transaction Agreement #2 Brian stated that he mailed the two "Huber" executed originals to Mark Whitt on 12/21/00. I left the two (replacement) unexecuted agreements with him in the event Mark cannot locate those mailed in December. Mark do you have these? Let me know ASAP. Enfolio Master Firm Purchase Sale Agreement dropped off two originals for execution (to replace the fax'd version). Should get back this week. Original Transaction Agreement Brian only has a fax'd copy. He wants to know if there is an original that exists. Let me know if we have any originals or whether the deal was originally done over the fax. chris x31666

emails.subject: Re: Huber Contracts
emails.body: Chris, The original transaction agreement were done via fax. We only have fax copies. The two amended and restated transaction agreement #2's he sent on Dec. 21 were inadvertently not executed by Huber. I sent them back, but somewhere they got lost in the shuffle. Let's have him execute the copies you left with him. Forwarded by Gerald Nemec/HOU/ECT on 02/01/2001 10:28 AM Mark Whitt@ENRON Sent by: Mark Whitt@ENRON 01/29/2001 11:05 AM
